report.summary: Day 16 cycle 5 standup: 325 pages live (Day 34 batch confirmed Ready on Vercel), Build v3 added Bittensor + Stablecoin Yield to queue, Community v16 extends FOMC content through Mar 18; NEW: Vercel build D4jF42mKj Error (stargate JSX + missing routes) — programmer task; rate limiter 0/6 and git index.lock remain blockers; FOMC T-2 days.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle (v4)
items: Pages live: 323 → 325 (+2 this cycle). Day 34 batch published: /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide + /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026. Both pages passed all QA gates (metadata, OG, JSON-LD, breadcrumbs). Vercel deploy 8S7NsPCzc triggered (was Building in publish report — verify Ready in dashboard).

PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 → 0 → 2 in one cycle. Cleared by publish cycle (btc-treasury + debit-cards promoted), then immediately replenished by Build v3: /learn/bittensor-tao-guide + /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026. Both SEO-validated, structured data confirmed, 5–6 internal links each. Ready to promote in next publish cycle.

Content delta: Bittensor guide (~2,800 words) covers TAO halving, 128 subnets, ETF filings, 65% March rally. Stablecoin yield guide (~2,600 words) covers Aave/Morpho/Pendle/Ethena/Curve with 3 risk-tiered yield stacks. Both fill existing content gaps on degen0x.

Design delta: Static OG images (1200×630 SVG+PNG) created for both new guides. PayFi breadcrumb accessibility fixed, dangerouslySetInnerHTML removed from bitcoin-treasury page, mobile table scroll CSS added across 3 pages.

Community delta: BTC treasury companies 6-post Twitter thread drafted. FOMC-week (T-2) content added through Wed Mar 18: DCA angle + debit card angle. Newsletter subject lines G/H/I updated. Posting schedule fully extended.

GSC organic signals: Day 16 of 14–21 day indexing window — first organic clicks from the 325-page corpus expected today or tomorrow. All pages crawlable. FOMC now T-2 days (Wed Mar 19) — yield/DCA content is perfectly timed for rate-decision searches.

API data health: All 6 routes confirmed healthy in EOD v3 sweep. Circuit breakers active. Rate limiter gap persists: 0/6 public routes protected (same as prior cycle). This is the only data-layer risk ahead of potential FOMC traffic spike.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ Publish Day 34 — 2 guides promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES: /learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide + /learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026. Vercel deploy 8S7NsPCzc triggered. PUBLISH_QUEUE cleared.

SHIPPED ✅ Build v3 — 2 new learn guides scaffolded, researched, written, SEO-optimised: /learn/bittensor-tao-guide + /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026. 0 new TS errors. Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
SHIPPED ✅ Design v3 — Static OG images for both Day 34 guides (1200×630). PayFi breadcrumb a11y fix. Removed dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Mobile table CSS. 3 pages improved.
SHIPPED ✅ Community v16 — BTC treasury Twitter thread (6 posts). FOMC-week DCA + debit card content through Mar 18. Newsletter updated (subjects G/H/I). Posting schedule extended.
SHIPPED ✅ EOD v3 — Full QA sweep: all 4 recent pages validated, 6 API routes confirmed healthy, no new regressions. TS error count unchanged (57, 2 files, non-blocking).

NEW BLOCKER 🔴 Vercel build D4jF42mKj FAILED — commit 1b4a15e ("Fix: commit missing ecosystem + courses routes and fix stargate JSX error") produced an error build 35m ago. Current production is 25ebFpMMz (still Current). 8S7NsPCzc is Latest/Ready but not yet promoted to Current. Programmer task: investigate stargate JSX error + missing ecosystem/courses routes and fix before next deploy.

NEW BLOCKER 🔴 git index.lock — stale lock from Mar 15 blocking all git operations. Published-pages.ts changes for Day 34 NOT yet committed or pushed. Fix: rm .git/index.lock, then git add/commit/push. Until resolved, 8S7NsPCzc may not include Day 34 pages in final build.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter — 0/6 public API routes protected. Token bucket in src/lib/rate-limiter.ts still not wired. FOMC T-2: traffic spike risk is highest it has been. ~30-min programmer task.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required. 325 pages have no wallet connectivity. Blocks gamification + referral hooks.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min. Blocks Playwright CI before Sprint 60 merges.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 curly apostrophe TS errors (non-blocking, carry-over).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial — ~9 days remaining. Jefe: add payment method.
OPEN 🟡 PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items — /learn/bittensor-tao-guide + /learn/stablecoin-yield-strategies-2026 — ready to promote in next publish cycle.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Unblock git and get Day 34 pages fully on Vercel. The Day 34 publish batch (bitcoin-treasury + crypto-debit-cards) triggered a Vercel deploy (8S7NsPCzc), but the underlying published-pages.ts commit is blocked by a stale index.lock. Jefe action: rm .git/index.lock → git add src/lib/published-pages.ts → git commit → git push. Without this, the 2 newest pages may not be in the canonical Vercel build. This is the highest-leverage 2-minute Jefe task in the queue.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiter before FOMC day (Wed Mar 19 = T-2). The organic traffic window has opened (GSC Day 16) and FOMC is the biggest catalyst of the month. If a CoinGecko-dependent API route fails under load, it degrades live price data across all 325 pages simultaneously. Fix is ~30 min: import checkRateLimit() and apply to /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics (and ideally all 6). This is a programmer task — delegate to Build v4.

PRIORITY 3 — Publish the 2-item queue + build FOMC explainer. Bittensor + Stablecoin Yield are SEO-ready — promote immediately in next publish cycle (327 pages). For Build v4: one high-priority FOMC-window piece — 'How a Fed rate cut affects crypto yields in 2026' — bridges existing PayFi/DCA/lending tools with rate-decision search intent. Last build window before the event. Publish by EOD Tuesday.
